items.title: GitHub Project bidirectional integration
items.full_title: GitHub Project bidirectional integration
items.body: TAG: convention maps 9 knowledge types to issue prefixes + labels. Harvest reads back. Same data, two views, zero duplication.

items.title: convention for knowledge structure mirroring
items.full_title: TAG: convention for knowledge structure mirroring
items.body: Every issue title prefixed with TAG: identifying knowledge origin. 9 types: METHODOLOGY, PATTERN, LESSON, EVOLUTION, STORY, TASK, BUG, PUB, HARVEST. Combined with matching GitHub labels.

items.title: Two-category item model for project boards
items.full_title: Two-category item model for project boards
items.body: GitHub Projects have two categories: board issues (planning, drafts) and repo items (issues + PRs with full context — labels, assignees, CI).

items.title: Bidirectional bridge — human collaboration + machine intelligence
items.full_title: Bidirectional bridge — human collaboration + machine intelligence
items.body: GitHub = collaboration layer. Knowledge = intelligence layer. Neither replaces the other — they feed each other.

items.title: Always handle HTTP responses from GitHub API
items.full_title: Always handle HTTP responses from GitHub API
items.body: No silent failures. Check status codes (200/201/400/401/403/404/422/429/502/503), parse errors, retry on gateway errors with exponential backoff.

items.title: Never pass tokens as CLI arguments
items.full_title: Never pass tokens as CLI arguments
items.body: Token zero-display compliance (v46). GH_TOKEN from env var only. --token CLI flag removed. Never in output, logs, or error messages.

items.title: v47 GitHub Project integration bridge
items.full_title: v47 GitHub Project integration bridge
items.body: Bidirectional bridge between collaboration (GitHub Issues/PRs) and intelligence (knowledge system). TAG: convention mirrors taxonomy. Entity convention auto-creates issues. New quality: Integre (#13).

items.title: Build gh_helper.py project item commands
items.full_title: Build gh_helper.py project item commands
items.body: Implement issue create, labels setup, project item-add, project get-id in gh_helper.py. Completed in this session.

items.title: Implement harvest from GitHub Project boards
items.full_title: Implement harvest from GitHub Project boards
items.body: Extend harvest to read board items, parse TAG: prefixes, route to correct knowledge layer. Future work.

items.title: Setup GitHub labels on satellite repos via API
items.full_title: Setup GitHub labels on satellite repos via API
items.body: labels setup command creates all 9 TAG: labels with correct colors. Needs to be run on each repo in the network.

items.title: #1 GitHub Project Integration
items.full_title: #1 GitHub Project Integration
items.body: Publication #1 on knowledge-live. Three-tier bilingual. Source + EN/FR summary + EN/FR complete. Covers TAG: convention, entity lifecycle, gh_helper.py commands.

items.title: Entity convention for typed project items
items.full_title: Entity convention for typed project items
items.body: #N:story/#N:task/#N:bug scoped notes auto-create GitHub issues with TAG: prefix. Entity lifecycle: created → in progress → completed → promoted.

items.title: New quality candidate Integre (#13)
items.full_title: New quality candidate Integre (#13)
items.body: The system extends into external platforms. GitHub Projects become live mirrors of knowledge structure. Extends Distribue, Persistant, complements Autonome.

items.title: Implement project sync — date-based bidirectional state reconciliation
items.full_title: Implement project sync — date-based bidirectional state reconciliation
items.body: Compare timestamps between knowledge items and GitHub items. Sync the stale side. Run during save/harvest. Covers: issue state changes, PR merges, new human-created issues, entity promotions.

items.title: Date-based bidirectional state sync
items.full_title: Date-based bidirectional state sync
items.body: Every knowledge item and GitHub item has a timestamp. On each session: read both sides, compare dates, sync the stale side. Reconciliation mechanism for the bidirectional bridge.

items.title: Add cross-reference links between docs and GitHub Project board
items.full_title: Add cross-reference links between docs and GitHub Project board
items.body: Documentation pages (landing, publications, hubs) must link to the GitHub Project board. GitHub Project board items must link back to their corresponding doc/pub pages. Bidirectional cross-references between both formats — doc pages reference board items, board items reference doc pages. Applies to all projects with a repo.

items.title: Autonomous documentation authorship — Claude as sole author, auto-create and publish
items.full_title: Autonomous documentation authorship — Claude as sole author, auto-create and publish
items.body: Dream goal: Claude autonomously creates documentation and publishes it as the unique author. Full pipeline from knowledge discovery to published doc with no human intervention. Requires: auto-detect documentation needs, generate content, create PR, merge (with approval), publish to GitHub Pages.

items.title: Implement project items-list — read all board items via GraphQL
items.full_title: Implement project items-list — read all board items via GraphQL
items.body: Paginated GraphQL query reading all board items with status, TAG: prefix parsing, timestamps, and summary by status/tag. Foundation for sync and harvest-from-boards.

items.title: labels on multiple repos
items.full_title: Implement labels setup-all — batch TAG: labels on multiple repos
items.body: Batch setup of all 9 TAG: labels across multiple repos in one command. Deployed to test-project-3, test-project-4, test-project-5, and knowledge core.

items.title: Beacon Network Integration
items.full_title: Beacon Network Integration
items.body: Knowledge beacon protocol (port 21337, subnet discovery) for inter-instance communication between Claude Code sessions. Core tooling deployed.

items.title: Hosted Project P6 — Export Documentation
items.full_title: Hosted Project P6 — Export Documentation
items.body: Multi-purpose documentation and publication management project hosted within knowledge-live. Subfolder scaffold created.

items.title: PQC Envelope Integration
items.full_title: PQC Envelope Integration
items.body: Post-quantum mutual authentication (ML-KEM-1024) for beacon-to-beacon encrypted communication. Script deployed, awaiting protocol integration.

items.title: Dynamic Web Publication from GitHub
items.full_title: Dynamic Web Publication from GitHub
items.body: Replace static roadmap tables with live data pulled from GitHub Project boards via API. Jekyll data files or JS fetch. Innovation target.

items.title: Hardware-Backed PQC Key Storage
items.full_title: FORECAST: Hardware-Backed PQC Key Storage
items.body: STM32 secure element integration for hardware-held ML-KEM-1024 keys. Upgrade from software-only PQC Envelope.

items.title: Multi-Satellite Real-Time Sync
items.full_title: FORECAST: Multi-Satellite Real-Time Sync
items.body: Real-time inter-instance communication via beacon network. Direct knowledge push/pull between active Claude instances.
